ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nationalities" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nationality or ethnicity */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the nationality or ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nationality or ethnicity */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time when the nationality or ethnicity was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the nationality or ethnicity was last updated */,
  "flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the nationality or ethnicity is active (True) or inactive (False) */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Languages table */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Regions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time when the language was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the language was last updated */,
  "flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the language is active (True) or inactive (False) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time when the region was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the region was last updated */,
  "flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the region is active (True) or inactive (False) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_nationalities" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-nationality pair */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Nationalities table */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time when the country-nationality pair was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the country-nationality pair was last updated */,
  "flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the country-nationality pair is active (True) or inactive (False) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the report is active (True) or inactive (False) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (insert, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the transaction */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the transaction */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was created */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was last updated */,
  "flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the transaction is active (True) or inactive (False) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
